decisions.briefing: Market data is unavailable today, so directional conviction is low. Cash sits at $477 — just under the $500 threshold that would trigger new buys — so no new positions are opened. All six existing holdings are retained; the system's stop-loss and profit-target mechanisms will handle any exits automatically. The screener shows strong momentum in OUST, MTN, and FLEX, which will be prioritized if cash is replenished via a sell.

market_education.summary_en: Market data feeds returned no price movement data for today's session, making it impossible to cite specific catalysts. In sessions like this, it is common for agents to see flat readings when data pipelines experience delays or the market has a shortened/holiday-adjacent session. Without confirmed directional signals, maintaining existing positions and preserving cash is the prudent default.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日市場數據未能正常回傳，NASDAQ與標普500均顯示零變動，研判為數據管道延遲或交易清淡所致。在缺乏明確方向性訊號的情況下，維持現有倉位、保留現金是較為穩健的策略。投資組合整體報酬率達+31.6%，暫不需要冒進追漲。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Cash drag occurs when uninvested cash in a portfolio earns little to no return, pulling down overall performance compared to a fully invested benchmark like VOO. Holding $477 idle while the market rises means that portion of the portfolio doesn't participate in gains — which is why the rules set a $500 threshold to push the agent toward deploying capital when conditions allow.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「現金拖累」（Cash Drag）指投資組合中閒置現金幾乎不產生回報，導致整體績效落後於標竿指數（如VOO）。當市場上漲時，未投資的477美元完全無法受惠——這也是為何策略規則設定500美元門檻，促使系統在條件允許時積極部署資金，減少現金佔比。
